meta.title: IRS + 501 (C)(4) = SOS?
meta.description: "So I guess my bottom line here is that we at the IRS should apologize for that, it was not intentional, and as soon as we found out what was going on, we took steps to make it better and I don't expect that to reoccur." So stated director of the IRS Exempt Organizations division Lois Lerner last May 10, as she explained to a meeting of the American Bar Association that her employees had singled out for extended examination scores of applicants for 501 (c)(4) status that "used names like Tea Par
